title: stevia sabulonis
intro: Stevia sabulonis, also known as the sand stevia, is a plant species that belongs to the sunflower family and is native to the mountainous regions of Brazil. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of stevia sabulonis include its ability to reduce blood pressure, alleviate digestive issues, and provide antioxidant properties. The plant is commonly prepared as a tea or extract, and its leaves can be used in herbal preparations, such as tinctures and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties.
